name: Tostado Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread refried beans mixed with taco seasoning mix.
2. Add a layer of sour cream mixed with mashed avocados.
3. Top with chopped onion.
4. Layer sliced black olives.
5. Continue with chopped and drained green chilies.
6. Sprinkle grated Monterey Jack cheese.
7. Add grated Cheddar cheese.
8. Place chopped tomatoes on top.
9. Finish with a layer of alfalfa sprouts to cover the dip.
10. Serve with round tortilla chips around or alongside.
